description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc sanity checks that runs on push to feature/sanity-checks-for-github-ci and on pull requests to master. Use two ubuntu-22.04 jobs, one for GCC C++03 Linux STL and one for GCC C++03 Linux No STL. In each job, check out the repository, fetch the latest changes, configure cmake with STL or without STL, verify the GCC version, and build with make.
